{"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"w5shaerpHPSsz7IPwcWRkQI","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"gemini-2.5-flash","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"tool_b0o7q3jus1t","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"json_log_parser.py","content":"import os\nimport json\nimport csv\nimport logging\nimport argparse\n\n# Configure logging\nlogging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')\n\ndef parse_log_files(directory_path):\n    \"\"\"\n    Iterates over all .json files in a given directory, extracts specific fields,\n    and returns a list of dictionaries.\n    \"\"\"\n    log_entries = []\n    for filename in os.listdir(directory_path):\n        if filename.endswith(\".json\"):\n            filepath = os.path.join(directory_path, filename)\n            logging.info(f\"Processing file: {filepath}\")\n            with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n                for line in f:\n                    try:\n                        entry = json.loads(line)\n                        timestamp = entry.get('timestamp', 'N/A')\n                        level = entry.get('level', 'N/A')\n                        message = entry.get('message', 'N/A')\n                        log_entries.append({\n                            'timestamp': timestamp,\n                            'level': level,\n                            'message': message\n                        })\n                    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n                        logging.warning(f\"Skipping malformed JSON line in {filename}: {line.strip()} - Error: {e}\")\n                    except Exception as e:\n                        logging.error(f\"Error processing line in {filename}: {line.strip()} - Error: {e}\")\n    return log_entries\n\ndef generate_csv_report(log_entries, output_csv_path):\n    \"\"\"\n    Saves the extracted log data into a single CSV file.\n    \"\"\"\n    if not log_entries:\n        logging.info(\"No log entries to write to CSV.\")\n        return\n\n    keys = log_entries[0].keys()\n    with open(output_csv_path, 'w', newline='') as output_file:\n        dict_writer = csv.DictWriter(output_file, fieldnames=keys)\n        dict_writer.writeheader()\n        dict_writer.writerows(log_entries)\n    logging.info(f\"CSV report generated successfully: {output_csv_path}\")\n\ndef main():\n    \"\"\"\n    Main function to parse command line arguments and execute the log parsing.\n    \"\"\"\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Parse JSON log files and generate a CSV summary.\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"directory_path\", help=\"Path to the directory containing JSON log files.\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--output_file\", default=\"log_summary.csv\",\n                        help=\"Name of the output CSV file (default: log_summary.csv).\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    if not os.path.isdir(args.directory_path):\n        logging.error(f\"Error: Directory not found at {args.directory_path}\")\n        return\n\n    logging.info(f\"Starting JSON log parsing in directory: {args.directory_path}\")\n    log_entries = parse_log_files(args.directory_path)\n    generate_csv_report(log_entries, args.output_file)\n    logging.info(\"JSON log parsing completed.\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"}}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":19439,"output_tokens":852},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4e5044aa-4209-422b-8519-57f0a8fdaaaa","uuid":"5ccb7f1f-b7d1-4cb7-ac1f-33c27688cd8c"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"msg_1763810303097","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"ccr_tool_smz71pugjya","name":"mcp__github_comment__update_claude_comment","input":{"body":"Claude Code is working… <img src=\"/tmp/github-images/image-1763810203974-0.png\" width=\"14px\" height=\"14px\" style=\"vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 4px;\" />\n\n### To Do\n\n- [x] Gather context by checking for `CLAUDE.md`\n- [x] Understand the request: Implement a File Parser for JSON Logs\n- [x] Plan the implementation steps\n- [x] Create a Python module (`json_log_parser.py`)\n  - [x] Implement `parse_log_files(directory_path)` function\n  - [x] Implement `generate_csv_report(log_entries, output_csv_path)` function\n  - [x] Implement `main()` function with argument parsing and logging\n  - [x] Handle missing fields gracefully (in `parse_log_files`)\n- [x] Commit changes and push to branch\n- [x] Provide a PR link\n\n### Summary of Changes\n\nImplemented a Python module `json_log_parser.py` that parses JSON log files from a specified directory, extracts `timestamp`, `level`, and `message` fields, and generates a summarized report in `log_summary.csv` format. The module includes error handling for malformed JSON and graceful handling of missing fields.\n\n[Create a PR](https://github.com/furqanahmadrao/MVP-Agent/compare/main...claude/issue-12-20251122-1116?quick_pull=1&title=feat%3A%20Implement%20JSON%20log%20parser%20with%20CSV%20output&body=##%20Summary%0AThis%20PR%20introduces%20a%20new%20Python%20module%20`json_log_parser.py`%20that%20can%20process%20JSON%20log%20files%20from%20a%20specified%20directory,%20extract%20`timestamp`,%20`level`,%20and%20`message`%20fields,%20and%20generate%20a%20summarized%20report%20in%20CSV%20format.%0A%0A##%20Test%20plan%0A- Create%20a%20directory%20with%20sample%20JSON%20log%20files%20(some%20valid,%20some%20with%20missing%20fields,%20some%20malformed).%0A- Run%20the%20script%20with%20the%20directory%20path%20and%20verify%20that%20`log_summary.csv`%20is%20generated%20correctly%20and%20contains%20the%20expected%20data.%0A- Verify%20that%20malformed%20JSON%20lines%20are%20skipped%20and%20missing%20fields%20are%20handled%20as%20'N/A'.%0A%0A%F0%9F%A4%96%20Generated%20with%20[Claude%20Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\n\n[View job run](https://github.com/furqanahmadrao/MVP-Agent/actions/runs/19594708517)"}}],"model":"gemini-2.5-flash","stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4e5044aa-4209-422b-8519-57f0a8fdaaaa","uuid":"762d847b-b72b-47a5-b3de-c5b440f1cdf2"}
